prompt: What should I watch out for with logging and GDPR compliance in my iOS app?

assertions.text: Mentions operational leaks (HTTP bodies with auth headers, DB queries with user params, URL paths with emails)
assertions.rationale: Skill covers commonly missed PII vectors — baseline only mentions obvious PII

assertions.text: Mentions PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy manifests required since May 2024
assertions.rationale: Skill covers this App Store requirement — baseline rarely mentions privacy manifests

assertions.text: States crash reporting generally does not require ATT consent
assertions.rationale: Skill clarifies this common confusion — crash diagnostics are not 'tracking'

assertions.text: Recommends .private(mask: .hash) for correlation without PII exposure
assertions.rationale: Skill's specific privacy annotation recommendation — baseline may just say 'don't log PII'
